title: Checkout requests timing out during peak sale
symptoms: p95 latency is above 20 seconds, customers see 504 errors, and active database connections are increasing.

title: Payment authorization timeouts from primary gateway
symptoms: Card authorizations fail with 502 responses and the external provider latency has increased.

title: Fulfillment processing is behind
symptoms: Kafka consumer lag is growing and recently placed orders are not reaching fulfillment.

title: Users unable to sign in
symptoms: The login endpoint returns 401 responses and token signature validation is failing.

title: Checkout displays expired promotional prices
symptoms: Customers see a checkout price that differs from the active catalog promotion after a promotion update.

title: Scheduled report exports contain invalid timestamps
symptoms: CSV reports generated after the morning release contain blank or malformed timestamps, causing customer finance imports to fail.
